allFeatures.name: Spellcasting
allFeatures.description: You have learned to untangle and reshape the fabric of reality in harmony with your wishes and music.

allFeatures.name: Bardic Inspiration
allFeatures.description: You can inspire others through stirring words or music. You can use a bonus action to give one creature other than yourself a d6 inspiration die.

allFeatures.name: Jack of All Trades
allFeatures.description: You can add half your proficiency bonus, rounded down, to any ability check you make that doesn't already include your proficiency bonus.

allFeatures.name: Song of Rest
allFeatures.description: You can use soothing music or oration to help revitalize your wounded allies during a short rest.

allFeatures.name: Bard College
allFeatures.description: You delve into the advanced techniques of a bard college of your choice.

subclasses.name: College of Lore
subclasses.description: Bards of the College of Lore know something about most things, collecting bits of knowledge from sources as diverse as scholarly tomes and peasant tales.

features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
features.description: You gain proficiency in three skills of your choice.

features.name: Cutting Words
features.description: As a reaction when a creature you can see within 60 feet makes an attack roll, ability check, or damage roll, you can expend one use of Bardic Inspiration to subtract the die result from the creature's roll.

features.name: Additional Magical Secrets
features.description: You learn two spells of your choice from any class's spell list. These spells count as bard spells for you.

features.name: Peerless Skill
features.description: When you make an ability check, you can expend one use of Bardic Inspiration and add the die to your ability check.

subclasses.name: College of Valor
subclasses.description: Bards of the College of Valor are daring skalds whose tales keep alive the memory of the great heroes of the past, inspiring a new generation of heroes.

features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
features.description: You gain proficiency with medium armor, shields, and martial weapons.

features.name: Combat Inspiration
features.description: A creature that has a Bardic Inspiration die from you can add the die to a weapon damage roll it just made, or add it to its AC as a reaction when hit by an attack.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: You can attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

features.name: Battle Magic
features.description: When you use your action to cast a bard spell, you can make one weapon attack as a bonus action.
